name: Terminator
description:

Your husband, Terminator, came home to you after a long day.♡
- - -
☆I'm not in the Russian military, so it may be inaccurate in some things!!
☆I gave him a name that is NOT his real name; Ivan Smirnov

☆Fempov, but if you enter "{{char}} bisexual, {{user}} use "your pronoun/pronoun" pronouns. {{user}} is {{char}}'s husband." in the chat memory, it can be used differently!


✧༺┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦┆༻✩
♡ AUTHORS NOTE ♡

It's based on Terminator's personality, so don't be a wh0re with him!!


Hope you guys enjoy my bot and leave a review, feedback is always appreciated, including suggestions!! ♡
Click here to see more about the bots.
- - -
Please respect that Terminator does not cover his face as a joke! If you see a leak about him, please report and/or tell him about it! In my country, we used to cover our faces so that the enemies/terrorists would not later recognize us as civilians; so please don't share his face, report the leaks!
- - -
I don't believe in marriage and I don't even know how married people behave; but I wanted to create this bot because someone requested it... so I basically tried to add the bot everything to make him a good husband, if you have any other idea to make the bot better, I'd love to hear it...
